markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss PSEO pipeline setup, image generation, and LLMs.txt implementation for various clients.](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PSEO complexity varies; publishing automation and content creation are key considerations](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Image generation with custom text requires workflow adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [LLMs.txt implementation is not standardized; typically involves a markdown file with page links and topics](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

## Topics

### PSEO Pipeline Setup

  - [Publishing automation is crucial for scale (100+ pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Consider CMS type and data structure (e.g., markdown, custom elements)](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Content creation may involve external research or proprietary data](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Localization adds significant complexity (hreflang tags, subfolders)](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Example page mockup is helpful for structure visualization](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Image Generation for Understory

  - [Current workflow uses topic as custom text for images](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Adjusting text requires changes to HTML template and mapping](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Potential solution: Add separate inputs for hero text and secondary text](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Full custom text control would need workflow rewrite](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### LLMs.txt Implementation

  - [File should be hosted on client's website (e.g., domain.com/llms.txt)](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Two common formats:](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
    1.  Markdown file with links to pages and topics
    2.  Full content of pages in raw markdown (can be token-heavy)
  - [Starting point: topic-URL links with brief descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Existing workflow can generate from sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Framer Publishing

  - [Previous method required custom Framer app in client's codebase](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Recent MCP support may simplify the process (needs investigation)](https://fathom.video/share/Uh25jHQPDiS6Bg1nCSzwNbi6VRbtPMzG?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

## Next Steps

  - File high-priority ticket for Understory image text control
  - Erik to submit ticket for LLMs.txt pipeline for Bubble
  - Investigate Framer's new MCP support for potential simplification
  - Consider creating documentation on PSEO setup based on this discussion
